title: crucianella gilanica subsp. carduchorum
intro: Crucianella gilanica subsp. carduchorum is a rare, endemic subspecies of the Crucianella gilanica plant, native to the Carduk Mountains in Azerbaijan, classified within the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Crucianella gilanica subsp. carduchorum include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to soothe gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations involving this plant typically involve drying its leaves and infusing them in hot water to create a tea or decoction for medicinal purposes.
